etymology.description: semantic 方(方) (fāng, "square") + phonetic 㐦(㐦) (liú)
etymology.interpretation: 旒 is a phono-semantic compound where the 方(方) (fāng, "square") component suggests association with structured elements or parts, and 㐦(㐦) provides the pronunciation liú. The character refers to tassels that hang from corners, often seen as decorative attachments dangling from square or rectangular structures like ceremonial canopies or standards.
